name: octo-php/symfony-bundle
description: Symfony Bundle for the Async PHP Platform — auto-configuration, service wiring, ResetHook auto-tagging, Flex recipe, and optional package auto-detection.

suggest.octo-php/symfony-messenger: Enables in-process Messenger transport via OpenSwoole channels
suggest.octo-php/symfony-otel: Enables OpenTelemetry traces and metrics export
suggest.octo-php/symfony-realtime: Enables WebSocket and advanced SSE helpers
